description_long: This is a small, open, flat-bottomed canoe with a pointed bow and a squared stern, primarily colored blue with a black lower hull and a gray outboard motor mounted at the rear. The interior features a simple, open seating area with a single bench seat and a flat floor, suitable for one or two occupants. The gunwales run along the top edge of the hull, providing structural rigidity and a handhold for entry or exit. The exterior hull is smooth and appears to be made of molded fiberglass or plastic, with a matte finish and minimal surface texture. The outboard motor is compact and functional, with a visible propeller and mounting bracket. There are no visible registration numbers, carrying handles, or additional accessories on the hull.
description: A small blue canoe with a flat bottom, pointed bow, and a gray outboard motor at the stern. The interior is open with a single bench seat and smooth gunwales.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed bow, open seating area, and blue upper hull.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat bottom, blue hull, black lower edge, and gray outboard motor at the stern.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the squared stern, outboard motor, and open interior space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the motor and hull profile.
